MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff,Jon Berkley Management is present. Represented by Peter Husman.
Attorney, Paul Arshawsky, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Mary Hori, is present.
Attorney, Ryan Scher, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Penelope Pahl, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 605B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-04-2010 is vacated.
